_doc: v0.31.0 independent-review config. Copy to .agent-toolkit/independent_review.json. Drives the independent_review_gate (Stop) + the independent-review skill. The gate fires at the done-boundary (spec status=verified + tasks done + feature-scope diff — STATE-based, NOT done-text regex; ID-16) and requires a fresh-context reviewer sub-agent (ID-14 'fresh-context review', NOT absolute independence) whose review artifact matches the current review-sha. Two convergence counters (ID-27): non_progress_streak escalates on N consecutive non-progress rounds; absolute_round_ceiling is the hard cap even when each round surfaces a NEW legitimate blocker (ID-20). Mode warn/block per enforce_mode (ID-3/ID-11): warn -> nudge + allow done; block (strict / AGENT_TOOLKIT_STRICT=1) -> chặn done until 0-BLOCKER or escalated. NEVER permanent-jams (ID-17): reviewer fail/timeout or block-streak -> degrade WARN + escalate DEV via gap-cant-fix.
_mode_note: block/warn is read from enforce_mode.json per_hook.independent_review_gate (toolkit convention) / AGENT_TOOLKIT_STRICT — NOT a field here.
_state_doc: Runtime state at .agent-toolkit/.independent_review.json, keyed by review_sha (hash of diff+spec+evals+invariants, normalized; ID-18/ID-23). Shape: {review_sha: {verdict: 'pass'|'tainted-review'|'escalated'|'open', round: int, non_progress: int, blocker_fingerprints: [..], packet_sha: str, updated_ts: int}}. verdict 'cached' is implicit when review_sha unchanged from a prior pass. Multi-session (ID-26): content-addressed by review_sha -> same diff = same artifact (idempotent, no collision).
